tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
no ip access-list extended 110
ip access-list extended 110
 permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 host 7.0.14.254
 exit
class-map match-any ICMP_ONLY
 match access-group 110
policy-map POLICE_ICMP
 class ICMP_ONLY
  police 16000 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 service-policy input POLICE_ICMP
end
write memory
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
enable
Switch#configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.
Switch(config)#no ip access-list extended 110
Switch(config)#ip access-list extended 110
Switch(config-ext-nacl)# permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 host 7.0.14.254
Switch(config-ext-nacl)# exit
Switch(config)#class-map match-any ICMP_ONLY
Switch(config-cmap)# match access-group 110
Switch(config-cmap)#policy-map POLICE_ICMP
Switch(config-pmap)# class ICMP_ONLY
Switch(config-pmap-c)#  police 16000 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-acti$000 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-actio         n drop
Switch(config-pmap-c-police)#interface GigabitEthernet0/1
Switch(config-if)# service-policy input POLICE_ICMP
Switch(config-if)#end
Switch#write memory
